summary: Added 'folder' project type: admin API validates that folder paths exist and are directories (new 'not_a_directory' error), collector expands folder-type entries into individual child cards via scanFolder(), each child carries a parentFolder field in dashboard.json. AdminAddForm gains the folder option and conditional helper text.

files_modified.change: Imported scanFolder. In collectAll(), expanded folder-type projects into child stubs before collecting. Added parentFolder passthrough in collectOne data object.
Extended validateLocation() to check fs.statSync().isDirectory() for type='folder', returning { error: 'not_a_directory' } when path exists but is a file.
Added 'folder' option to type select. Added conditional helper text and 'folder path' label when type='folder'. Added 'not_a_directory' to ERROR_MESSAGES.

files_created.purpose: Pure function scanFolder(folderPath) — reads immediate children via readdirSync, skips symlinks and files, filters by isValidProject() (package.json or .aitri present), returns array of project stubs with parentFolder field.
Unit tests for folder-scanner.js: TC-021h/e/f, TC-022h/e/f/g, TC-025h/e/f, TC-NFR021h, TC-NFR022h.
Vitest tests for AdminAddForm folder type UI: TC-020h/e/n/f, TC-024h/f/e.

test_results.notes: 12 unit tests pass in folder-scanner.test.js. 16 e2e tests pass including TC-023h/e/f (folder API validation) and TC-e2eFolderScan, TC-e2eFolderEmpty (full collector cycle). 7 Vitest tests pass in AdminAddForm.test.jsx for TC-020h/e/n/f and TC-024h/f/e.
